overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character snowboarding through a snowy alpine landscape during golden hour. The character traverses open snow fields, pine forests, and approaches a rock formation with floating objective balloons visible in the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain meadow with scattered pine trees

events.description: floating objective balloon becomes visible in the sky ahead

agents.ego_description: snowboarding through shallow powder snow among scattered pine trees heading toward open field

entered.detail: cluster of tall evergreen pine trees casting long shadows across the snow
snow-capped rocky mountain peaks forming the backdrop

segments.scene_description: The character snowboards through a snowy mountain meadow with scattered pine trees on either side. The sun casts long golden-hour shadows across the snow. A floating objective balloon appears in the distance, marking a destination point in the game world.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field with distant mountain backdrop

events.description: character begins gradual left turn while maintaining downhill speed

agents.ego_description: traversing open snow field toward distant tree line and mountain slope

entered.detail: colorful hot air balloon-style game objective marker with basket
second objective balloon floating to the right of the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a wide-open snow field with two floating objective balloons visible in the sky ahead. The scattered trees fall behind as the terrain opens up, revealing expansive mountain views. The character begins a gradual turn toward the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain slope with dense pine forest

events.description: terrain shifts from flat field to sloped mountainside with dense tree cover

agents.ego_description: carving left turn along mountain slope with dense forest on left side

entered.detail: thick forest of evergreen trees lining the left side of the slope

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and traverses along a mountain slope, with a dense pine forest now lining the left side. The terrain becomes more sloped and the snow appears slightly deeper. One balloon objective passes out of view while the second remains visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: rock overhang and cave entrance area

events.description: character enters shadow of large rock formation, lighting becomes darker and more diffused

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering beneath a large rock overhang at the edge of the slope

entered.detail: massive brown rock outcropping with rough texture forming an overhang
dark opening beneath the rock overhang leading into shadowed interior

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive rock formation at the edge of the slope and enters beneath its overhang. The lighting shifts dramatically as the character moves from bright sunlight into the shadowed cave entrance. The dense forest falls away behind as the terrain becomes rocky and enclosed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sun-drenched alpine meadow that gradually transitions into a shadowed rocky overhang. It begins with the character snowboarding through a snowy field dotted with pine trees, where long golden-hour shadows stretch across the terrain toward a distant floating objective balloon. As the scattered trees fall behind, the scene opens into an expansive snow field under a wide sky featuring two objective balloons before the character begins a gradual turn to the left. The camera then follows the character along a steeper mountain slope lined by a dense pine forest, with one balloon drifting out of view as the snow deepens. Finally, the bright sunlight vanishes as the character glides away from the forest and enters the dark, enclosed space beneath a massive rock formation.
